concerns.text: FR-006 (Bonferroni correction) lacks an explicit anchor to a User Story. While it supports the statistical rigor of US-2, the spec requires an explicit reference (e.g., '(See US-2)') or a clear statement that it serves a specific story to prevent it from being flagged as scope creep.

FR-009 (Dataset validation) is anchored to US-1 in the clarification note, but the main requirement text does not contain the anchor. To ensure robust traceability, the anchor should be moved to the primary requirement line or the clarification note should be integrated into the main text.

FR-010 (Associational findings) lacks an explicit anchor. It supports the interpretation of results in US-2, but without a '(See US-2)' tag or similar, it risks being identified as an unanchored requirement.
FR-013 (Collinearity diagnostics) lacks an explicit anchor. It supports the statistical validity of US-2, but the requirement text does not reference the story it serves.
